mainEntity.name: I didn't tell my employer about the crash right away—can I still file a claim in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: In Idaho, you should report within 60 days, but you may still have up to one year to file a legal claim. Delays complicate your case, so you should report the incident and consult a lawyer immediately.
